Data set can be generated by using a spreadsheet upload or by using a scheduled extraction process from Oracle Fusion application.

POI_SPEND_DATA_INT.description: Interface table that stores spend data from other applications.

POI_TAXONOMY_DATA.description: This table contains information about the taxonomy and their category values. The category segment values and descriptions are stored in this table.

POI_TAXONOMY_HDR.description: This table contains information about the taxonomy properties. Taxonomy properties are description, category levels, category value, and category description separators and so on. It also stores the information about taxonomy type, which determines the specific category ID column to be used in the data set during classification process or during knowledge base creation.

POI_TAXONOMY_SEGMENTS.description: This table contains the denormalized information of the poi_taxonomy_data.

POI_TRANSACTIONS.description: This table contains information about the transactions within a batch. These are the transactions that will be classified and have been copied to this table from data set at the onset of classification process.

POI_TS_BATCHES.description: This table contains information about data sets that are used for creating a sample training set. A sample training set is generated from a data set based on the volume specified by the user. Sampling algorithms intelligently pick out the most unique transactions from the data set in order to have the best examples available in a training set.

POI_TS_FETURE_COUNTER_GT.description: Global Temporary table being used for bulk insert of transactions.

POI_TS_KM_PARAM.description: This table contains internal data and used by training set wizard.

POI_TS_OUT_RESULT.description: This table contains information about the sample training sets. When the sampling process is run on a Data Set the output sample data set gets stored in this table.

POI_TXNMY_SEG_LOOKUP.description: This table contains information about categories within a taxonomy. It also contains the hierarchy information of a category's parent segment and its description.

POZ_ACNT_ADDR_REQS.description: Table for supplier bank account and address assignment requests

POZ_ACNT_ADDR_SUMM_REQS.description: This table stores the details of supplier bank account and address assignment requests.

POZ_ACNT_GEN_REQS.description: This table is for supplier bank account requests

POZ_ADDRESS_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about supplier address requests, such as adding an address, updating an adress and removing an address.

POZ_APPROVAL_HISTORY.description: This table contains information about the approval and control history of supplier registration requests, spend authorization requests and supplier profile change requests, etc. This will enable us to show the critical approval action history even after SOA approval data is purged.

POZ_APPROVAL_USER_COMMENTS.description: POZ_APPROVAL_USER_COMMENTS table stores the comment entered by the approver while taking the approval action. User can enter multiple comments for a given approval action.

POZ_B2B_DOCUMENT_CONFIGS.description: This is the Document Configuration table containing document configuration information for the B2B Supplier Model Integration.

POZ_BUS_CLASSIFICATIONS.description:
This table stores information about the business classifications for suppliers. Examples of business classifications are Women Owned, Minority Owned, Small Business, etc.
In each row in this table, the supplier is identified by TCA party id; the business classification is identified by the lookup type, and lookup code. Each row also contains information about the business classification such as status, start date, end date, certificate number, certifying agency, and expiration date of the certificate.

POZ_BUS_CLASSIFICATIONS_.description:
This table stores information about the business classifications for suppliers. Examples of business classifications are Women Owned, Minority Owned, Small Business, etc.
In each row in this table, the supplier is identified by TCA party id; the business classification is identified by the lookup type, and lookup code. Each row also contains information about the business classification such as status, start date, end date, certificate number, certifying agency, and expiration date of the certificate.

POZ_BUS_CLASS_REQS.description: This table stores information about business classification requests for suppliers, such as adding a new classification, updating a classification or removing a classification.

POZ_CERTIFYING_AGENCIES.description: Table for creating and managing Certifying Agencies for business classifications.

POZ_CERT_AGENCY_CLASSFNS.description: This table is for creating association between an agency and a business classification for which the certifying agency provides certification.

POZ_CONTACT_ATTRIBUTES.description:
This is a main table that will store data pertaining to some properties of a particular contact. 

Currently, it stores the access level of a particular contact. At the UI level, the contact access will be restricted to either the Supplier level (default) or at the Supplier Site level. This is the table which records that selection. So there will be a single record for a particular contact. This table will store the data for approved contacts.

POZ_CONTACT_ATTRIBUTE_REQUEST.description:
This is the staging table that will store data pertaining to the kind of access level a particular contact has. At the UI level, the contact access will be restricted to either the Supplier level (default) or at the Supplier Site level. This is the table which records that selection but only for unapproved records i.e. when the contact is not approved or when the contact is approved but user account is not created by IDx.
 
Since this is a staging table which holds unapproved data, data will be moved from this table to the main table (POZ_CONTACT_REQUESTS) on being approved.

POZ_CONTACT_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about supplier contact requests, such as adding a contact, updating a contact and removing a contact.

POZ_CONT_ADDR_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about supplier requests for contact-address links, such as adding a contact for an address, updating an address contact or removing a contact from an address.

POZ_DF_FIRMOGRAPHIC_MAPPING.description: This table stores the mapping between Oracle Fusion Procurement Suppliers attributes and Oracle DataFox attributes as defined within the DataFox application by end users. The user defined mapping is copied to this table and kept in sync thereafter if changed. This table determines if a mapped Fusion Procurement Suppliers attribute should be updated only if it is currently Null if the attribute update is being driven by DataFox

POZ_DF_SCORING_CRITERIA.description: This table stores information about DataFox scoring criteria.

POZ_EXT_DATA_MAPPING.description: This table serves as a mapping layer between the field names provided by external data provider APIs and supplier attributes.

POZ_EXT_DATA_PROVIDERS.description: This table stores information about data providers supported to search and enrich supplier data. It includes details such as the primary provider, provider status and other relevant information about data providers.

POZ_EXT_DATA_SUP_PROV_IDS.description: This table stores the mapping between the internal FA (Financial Application) identifiers and the corresponding entity identifiers provided by external data providers. It is primarily used during periodic data refreshes to track which FA entity (such as supplier, contact, or address) is associated with the corresponding company, address, or contact on the provider's side.

POZ_INFOLET_COUNTS.description: Context and count information for the infolet UI components on the Source to Settle page.

POZ_NEW_SUPP_DOC_CONFIG.description: This table stores information about tax country specific configurations of notification content to be sent to newly spend authorized suppliers. A seed data row representing the global configuration will be created in this table.

POZ_PRODUCT_SERVICE_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about supplier requests for adding new products and services.

POZ_PROVISIONABLE_ROLES.description: This table stores data for the provisionable role configuration, such as whether a role is allowed to be provisioned to supplier users, whether the role can be requested by supplier users, whether the role is defaulted for supplier portal/sourcing users.

POZ_REG_DENIED_PARTIES.description: This table stores information about supplier registration denied party.

POZ_SEARCH_SUGGESTIONS_TLP.description: POZ Search Suggestions value table is used for Auto Suggest feature under Quick Search

POZ_SEARCH_SUGGESTIONS_TLP_GT.description: POZ Search Suggestions value table is used for Auto Suggest feature under Quick Search

POZ_SITE_ASSIGNMENTS_ALL_M.description: This table stores information about your supplier site assignment level attributes.

POZ_SITE_ASSIGNMENTS_ALL_M_.description: This table stores information about your supplier site assignment level attributes.

POZ_SITE_ASSIGNMENTS_INT.description:
This table holds Supplier Site Assignments information which is loaded
by the user for import.

POZ_SPEND_AUTH_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about the Spend Authorization Requests. Each row includes the request number, the source from where the spend authorization request was raised, the information about when and by whom the request was submitted and rejected (if applicable), etc.

POZ_SUPPLIERS.description: This table stores information about your supplier level attributes. Each row includes the purchasing, receiving, invoice, tax, classification, and general information. Oracle Purchasing uses this information to determine active suppliers.

POZ_SUPPLIERS_.description: This table stores information about your supplier level attributes. Each row includes the purchasing, receiving, invoice, tax, classification, and general information. Oracle Purchasing uses this information to determine active suppliers.

POZ_SUPPLIERS_DENIED_PARTIES.description: This table stores information about supplier denied party.

POZ_SUPPLIERS_DENIED_PARTIES_.description: This table stores information about supplier denied party.

POZ_SUPPLIERS_INT.description: This table holds supplier interface data

POZ_SUPPLIERS_PII.description: This is a secure table with VPD policies used to store tax identifier information about suppliers.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" and "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" are granted access to this table.  The Organization Type identifies whether these tax identifiers are PII attributes.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" will be able to access all rows in this table, those with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" privilege can only access rows whose Organization Type does not equal Individual or Foreign Individual.

POZ_SUPPLIERS_PII_.description: This is a secure table with VPD policies used to store tax identifier information about suppliers.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" and "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" are granted access to this table.  The Organization Type identifies whether these tax identifiers are PII attributes.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" will be able to access all rows in this table, those with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" privilege can only access rows whose Organization Type does not equal Individual or Foreign Individual.

POZ_SUPPLIER_CONTACTS.description: This table stores the relationship between supplier contact and address.

POZ_SUPPLIER_CONTACTS_.description: This table stores the relationship between supplier contact and address.

POZ_SUPPLIER_ENTITY_CONFIG.description: Captures configured supplier profile values for registration, self service profile maintenance and profile change request approval flows.

POZ_SUPPLIER_INT_REJECTIONS.description: Contains suppliers, sites, contacts rejections information.

POZ_SUPPLIER_MAPPINGS.description: This table stores references to supplier requests and/or their corresponding supplier parties in TCA. Other supplier profile request tables can utilize the references to find out their associated supplier party or supplier registration.

POZ_SUPPLIER_MERGE_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about suppliers that Supplier Merge updates. The Supplier Merge process inserts information into this table and enterprise scheduler uses this information to merge suppliers.

POZ_SUPPLIER_MERGE_REQUESTS_.description: This table stores information about suppliers that Supplier Merge updates. The Supplier Merge process inserts information into this table and enterprise scheduler uses this information to merge suppliers.

POZ_SUPPLIER_NEWS_B.description: This table is the base table for the Supplier Portal application's supplier news rich text news content.  This rich text news is maintained in multiple languages by an internal administrator using FSM.  Only one row should exist in this table.

POZ_SUPPLIER_NEWS_TL.description: The TL table for the Supplier Portal's supplier news rich text news content which is maintained in multiple languages.

POZ_SUPPLIER_OPTIONS.description: Stores default values for supplier configurations.

POZ_SUPPLIER_REGISTRATIONS.description: This table stores the information about supplier registrations and supplier onboarding requests.

POZ_SUPPLIER_SITES_ALL_M.description: This table stores information about your supplier site level attributes. You need a row for unique combination of supplier address, operating unit and the business relationship that you have with the supplier.

POZ_SUPPLIER_SITES_ALL_M_.description: This table stores information about your supplier site level attributes. You need a row for unique combination of supplier address, operating unit and the business relationship that you have with the supplier.

POZ_SUPPLIER_SITES_INT.description:
This table holds Supplier Site information which is loaded
by the user for import. The columns in the table map to corresponding columns
in POZ_SUPPLIER_SITES_ALL_M table. Supplier import application uses this information to create a new Supplier Site record. Each row in the table will be joined to the appropriate Supplier using the VENDOR_ID column.This is the open interface table for POZ Supplier Sites. Use it in conjunction with POZ_SUPPLIERS_INT table.

POZ_SUPPLIER_SITES_PII.description: This is a secure table with VPD policies used to store tax identifier information about supplier site.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Site Tax Identifiers PII Data"  are granted access to this table.

POZ_SUPP_ACCT_OWNER_REQUESTS.description: Table stores the account owner information for bank account in a change request. Actual data for account owners will be stored in IBY_ACCOUNT_OWNERS_INT table.  This table is used to link the Account Owner change to the Bank Account Change using TEMP_EXT_BANK_ACCT_ID

POZ_SUPP_ADDRESS_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about supplier address requests, such as adding an address, updating an adress and removing an address.

POZ_SUPP_BANK_ACCT_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores the information about the supplier level bank account attributes pertaining to change requests.

POZ_SUPP_BUS_CLASS_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores the information about supplier business classifications level attributes pertaining to change requests.

POZ_SUPP_CONFIG_MATCH.description: This stores the types of parties against which matches are searched by the de-deduplication engine during supplier creation

POZ_SUPP_CONTACT_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about supplier contact change requests, such as adding a contact, updating a contact and inactivating a contact.

POZ_SUPP_CONT_ADDR_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about supplier change requests for contact-address links, such as adding an address to a contact, removing an address from a contact,  adding a contact for an address,  or removing a contact from an address,

POZ_SUPP_INTERM_ACCT_REQUESTS.description: Table  stores intermediary account information for bank account in a change request. Actual data for intermediary accounts will be stored in IBY_ACCOUNT_OWNERS_INT table.  This table is used to link the intermediary account change to the Bank Account Change using TEMP_EXT_BANK_ACCT_ID

POZ_SUPP_ORG_DETAILS_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores data pertaining to supplier organization details with reference to a change request.

POZ_SUPP_PMT_ATTR_REQUESTS.description: Stores Payment Attributes related information for Change Requests.

POZ_SUPP_PMT_METHOD_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores the information about supplier site payment method level attributes pertaining to change requests.

POZ_SUPP_PROD_SERV_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores information about supplier Products and services attributes pertaining to change requests.

POZ_SUPP_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores the information about supplier requests. This acts as the header table for storing the Supplier Change Request details.

POZ_SUPP_REQUESTS_PII.description: This is a secure table with VPD policies used to store tax identifier information about supplier profile change request.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" and "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" are granted access to this table.  The Organization Type identifies whether these tax identifiers are PII attributes.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" will be able to access all rows in this table, those with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" privilege can only access rows whose Organization Type does not equal Individual or Foreign Individual.

POZ_SUPP_SITE_ASSIGN_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores the information about supplier site assignment level attributes pertaining to change requests.

POZ_SUPP_SITE_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores the information about supplier site level attributes pertaining to change requests.

POZ_SUPP_TAX_DETAILS_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores data pertaining to supplier tax details with reference to a change request.

POZ_SUPP_TEMP_BANK_REQUESTS.description: Table for storing information that is specific to a bank account in a change request

POZ_SUPP_TPP_REL_REQUESTS.description: This staging table stores data pertaining to third-party payment relationships with reference to a change request.

POZ_SUPP_USER_DATA_ACCESS_REQS.description: This table stores information about User Data Access change details for supplier profile change requests.

POZ_SUPP_USER_ROLE_REQUESTS.description: This table stores information about User Role change details for supplier profile change requests.

POZ_SUP_ADDRESSES_INT.description: Interface table to import Supplier Addresses.

POZ_SUP_ATTACHMENTS_INT.description: Interface table to import supplier attachments, including supplier level attachments, supplier site attachments and business classification attachments.

POZ_SUP_BUS_CLASS_INT.description: Interface table to import Supplier Business Classifications

POZ_SUP_CONTACTS_INT.description: Interface table to import Supplier Contacts.

POZ_SUP_CONTACT_ADDRESSES_INT.description: Interface table to import Supplier Contact Addresses.

POZ_SUP_PRODUCTS_SERVICES.description: This table stores information about product and services that suppliers have indicated to the enterprise that they can provide.

POZ_SUP_PRODUCTS_SERVICES_.description: This table stores information about product and services that suppliers have indicated to the enterprise that they can provide.

POZ_SUP_PROD_SERV_INT.description: Interface table to import Supplier Products and Services Category

POZ_SUP_REG_PII.description: This is a secure table with VPD policies used to store tax identifier information about supplier registrations.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" and "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" are granted access to this table.  The Organization Type identifies whether these tax identifiers are PII attributes.  Only users with "Maintain Supplier Tax Identifiers PII Data" will be able to access all rows in this table, those with "Maintain Supplier Corporate Tax Identifiers Data" privilege can only access rows whose Organization Type does not equal Individual or Foreign Individual.

POZ_SUP_REG_SESSION_TOKENS.description: This table stores the information about the supplier registration session tokens.

POZ_SUP_THIRDPARTY_INT.description: Interface table to import Third Party Payment relationships data. Imported data goesto POZ_SUP_THIRDPARTY_PAYMENT_REL.

POZ_SUP_THIRDPARTY_PAYMENT_REL.description: This table stores information about the third party payment relationships.

POZ_SUP_THIRDPARTY_PAYMENT_RE_.description: This table stores information about the third party payment relationships.

POZ_UP_REQUESTS.description: This table stores the master records for user/role provision requests, such as creating a user account, adding/removing a role for a user account etc.

POZ_UP_ROLE_REQUESTS.description: This table stores the supplier user role membership requests, such as adding or removing a role for a supplier user.

POZ_UP_USER_REQUESTS.description: This table stores the supplier user account requests, such as creating a user account, inactivate/activate a user account etc.

POS_USER_ACCESS_VALUES.description: This is the main table that will store the access attributes specified for users from User Account UI which are in approved state. Both supplier and supplier site access data will be stored in this table.

POS_USER_ACCESS_VAL_REQUESTS.description:
This is the staging table that will store the access attributes specified for users from User Account UI which are either in 1) to be approved state or 2) approved state but user account is not created by IDx engine. Both supplier and supplier site access data will be stored in this table.
Since this is a staging table which holds unapproved data, data will be moved from this table to the main table (POS_USER_ACCESS_VALUES) on being approved.

POQ_AGGREGATE_REC_MAPPING.description: POQ_AGGREGATE_REC_MAPPING stores the mapping information about an aggregate response repository record and the individual survey responses used to derive that response.

POQ_ASSESSMENTS.description: POQ_ASSESSMENTS contains assessments created based on a qualification model for supplier, supplier site combination. Each assessment is in the context of a procurement business unit, and carries an outcome once the assessment is evaluated.

POQ_ASSESSMENT_QUALS.description: POQ_ASSESSMENT_QUALS contains all qualifications that are included in an assessment. The qualifications need to be in the same procurement business unit as the assessment. The qualification needs to be valid during the entire life of the assessment.

POQ_AUTOMATION_ERRORS.description: A table to store errors across different automatic processes in supplier qualification that can be displayed to the user or used for diagniostic purposes.

POQ_AUTO_ERROR_ATTRIBUTES.description: Table to store additional attributes for records in POQ_AUTOMATION_ERRORS.

POQ_EVALUATION_TEAM.description: POQ_EVALUATION_TEAM stores the details of all the evaluation team members included in the initiative. These are workers who can access the initiative and can contribute to the evaluation process.

POQ_INITIATIVES.description: POQ_INITIATIVES stores initiatives created in the context of a procurement business unit. Each row consists of an initiative owner, type of initiative such as assessment or qualification, initiative launch date, initiative completion date. It also stores qualification model in case of the assessment type of an initiative.

POQ_INITIATIVE_SUPPLIERS.description: POQ_INITIATIVE_SUPPLIERS contains all the suppliers and supplier sites that are part of the initiative along with supplier contact and internal responder contact information.

POQ_INIT_MULTI_RESPONDERS.description: POQ_INIT_MULTI_RESPONDERS table will store the default multiple internal responders for the initiative. The internal responders are defaulted to each supplier/supplier site. The table will also store the internal responders for each initiative supplier record when multiple internal responder questionnaires are sent.

POQ_INIT_QUAL_AREAS.description: POQ_INIT_QUAL_AREAS contains qualification areas included in an initiative. For Qualification type of an initiative, these areas are added to the initiative by the user. For Assessment type of an initiative, these are inherited from the qualification model selected on the initiative.

POQ_QNAIRE_RULES.description: POQ_QNAIRE_RULES stores questionnaire rules generated during the external supplier registration process.

POQ_QNAIRE_RULE_ENTITY.description: POQ_QNAIRE_RULE_ENTITY stores questionnaire rule response sections during the supplier registration process.

POQ_QUALIFICATIONS.description: POQ_QUALIFICATIONS stores qualifications created for a supplier, or supplier and supplier site combination in the context of a procurement business unit. Once the qualification is evaluated, it carries an outcome, which can be used in other procurement flows.

POQ_QUALIFICATION_OPTIONS.description: POQ_QUALIFICATION_OPTIONS contains the record for storing the default values when configuring supplier qualification.

POQ_QUAL_AREAS_B.description: POQ_QUAL_AREAS_B stores qualification areas that group related questions used to evaluate a supplier. Qualification areas are owned by a procurement business unit and are revision controlled.

POQ_QUAL_AREAS_TL.description: POQ_QUAL_AREAS_TL contains the translatable section name for each qualification area.

POQ_QUAL_AREA_BU_ACCESSES.description: POQ_QUAL_AREA_BU_ACCESSES stores all the procurement business units that can access a given qualification area with a specific revision.

POQ_QUAL_AREA_OUTCOMES.description: POQ_QUAL_AREA_OUTCOMES stores the outcomes that are included on the qualification area.

POQ_QUAL_AREA_QUESTIONS.description: POQ_QUAL_AREA_QUESTIONS stores the questions that are included in the qualification area.

POQ_QUAL_MODELS.description: POQ_QUAL_MODELS stores qualification models that group qualification areas used to evaluate a supplier overall. Qualification models are owned by a procurement business unit and are revision controlled.

POQ_QUAL_MODEL_AREAS.description: POQ_QUAL_MODEL_AREAS contains all the qualification areas that are included in a qualification model.

POQ_QUAL_MODEL_BU_ACCESSES.description: POQ_QUAL_MODEL_BU_ACCESSES stores all the procurement business units that can access a given qualification model revision.

POQ_QUAL_MODEL_OUTCOMES.description: POQ_QUAL_MODEL_OUTCOMES contains all the outcomes that are included in a qualification model.

POQ_QUAL_RESPONSES.description: POQ_QUAL_RESPONSES stores the responses associated with supplier qualification questions.

POQ_QUESTIONS_B.description: POQ_QUESTIONS_B constitutes the supplier qualification question library. The table stores all the questions created by a buying organization. Each row in this table corresponds to one revision of a question, and carries information such as question name, type of a question, type of a responder, critical question flag.

POQ_QUESTIONS_TL.description: POQ_QUESTIONS_TL contains the translatable question text, question hint and preferred response text for each question.

POQ_QUESTION_BRANCHES.description: POQ_QUESTION_BRANCHES stores a list of follow up questions that can be asked to suppliers or internal responders based on their response for a given question.

POQ_QUESTION_SCORES.description: The POQ_QUESTION_SCORES table stores the range of values and scores for numeric type questions that are set for automatic scoring.

POQ_QUESTNAIRES_B.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRES_B stores questionnaires generated during the initiative creation process. Supplier type questionnaires are sent to suppliers. Internal responder type questionnaires are sent to workers from the qualifying enterprise. This table also stores supplier registration questionnaire.

POQ_QUESTNAIRES_TL.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRES _TL stores translated questionnaire title and introduction text generated during the initiative creation from EBI or manual process.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_ACC_RESPS.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRE_ACC_RESPS stores various question acceptable responses included in a questionnaire along with the sequence of the acceptable responses at the time that the questionnaire is launched.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_QUESTIONS.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRE_QUESTIONS stores all the root level as well as branching questions included in each questionnaire. At the time of initiative launch, the questionnaire is frozen, and only the questions that are active at the time of launch are included in the questionnaire.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESPONSES.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESPONSES stores the response details such as response comment, acceptance note for each question on the questionnaire sent to suppliers as well as internal responders. The actual response value to a question is stored in POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESP_VALUES. POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESPONSES table holds all the questions on the questionnaire irrespective of the fact that if responder has seen and responded to a question or not on a questionnaire. If responder responds to a question, then response details are filled in. If responder does not respond to a certain question or never sees the question, the response details remain empty.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESP_HEADERS.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESP_HEADERS stores header level information, such as questionnaire response status, supplier and supplier contact information, questionnaire submission date. Supplier qualification creates a record in this table for every questionnaire sent at the time of initiative launch.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESP_SECTIONS.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESP_SECTIONS stores various sections included in a questionnaire response along with details such as if a section is completed, if a section has been generated with its resposnes.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESP_VALUES.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRE_RESP_VALUES stores the response value, which could be a date, text or number value, to a given question on a questionnaire. For question of type multiple choice, an entry is created in this table for each of the acceptable response for the question. If responder selects that acceptable response, then IS_SELECTED_FLAG is set to 'Y', otherwise it is set to 'N'.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_SECTIONS_B.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRE_SECTIONS_B stores various sections included in a questionnaire along with details such as section name, display sequence, instruction text for each section.

POQ_QUESTNAIRE_SECTIONS_TL.description: POQ_QUESTNAIRES_SECTIONS_TL stores translated section name and instruction text for each section in a questionnaire.

POQ_QUES_ACC_RESPONSES_B.description: POQ_QUES_ACC_RESPONSES_B stores acceptable responses for a multiple choice question along with other details such as preferred response and display sequence. It also stores acceptable responses for multiple choice questions mapped to the supplier profile.

POQ_QUES_ACC_RESPONSES_TL.description: POQ_QUES_ACC_RESPONSES_TL contains the translatable response text for each acceptable response.

POQ_RECENT_ACTIVITIES.description: POQ_RECENT_ACTIVITIES contains all the recent activities made on 4 transaction objects - initiative, qualification, assessment, questionnaire and the activity of cancelation of a supplier from an initiative.

POQ_REMOVED_QUESTIONS.description: POQ_REMOVED_QUESTIONS stores all the questions that are removed from the questionnaire while customizing the questionnaire for a given initiative. The removed questions can be restored back into the questionnaire before the initiative is launched. Since questionnaire cannot be customized after the launch, removed questions are deleted from this table after launch.

POQ_REPOS_SURVEY_RESPONSES.description: POQ_REPOS_SURVEY_RESPONSES is used to store the accepted responses of each Internal Responder from Questionnaire Response Headers and Questionnaire Responses tables after the acceptance of Questionnaire Response.

POQ_REPOS_SURVEY_RESP_VALUES.description: POQ_REPOS_SURVEY_RESP_VALUES stores the response value, which could be a date, text or number value, to a given question from an Internal Responder in a Survey. For question of type multiple choice multiple selections, an entry is created in this table for each of the multiple choice selection from the Internal Responder.

POQ_RESPONSE_REPOSITORY.description: POQ_RESPONSE_REPOSITORY stores responses to questions from the question library. When a new response is received to a question for a given supplier, an entry is created in this table with response details such as response submission date, response acceptance date. The response value to a question is stored in POQ_RESP_REPOSITORY_VALUES. POQ_RESPONSE_REPOSITORY table can also be updated due to changes in the supplier profile or a response from a supplier to a sourcing document. For a site level question, the response is stored in a context of a supplier site.

POQ_RESP_REPOSITORY_VALUES.description: POQ_RESP_REPOSITORY_VALUES stores the response value, which could be a date, text or number value, to a given question from a supplier. For question of type multiple choice multiple selections, an entry is created in this table for each of the multiple choice selection from supplier.

POQ_RESP_REPOS_BUS_CLASS.description: POQ_RESP_REPOS_BUS_CLASS stores the response to a given question from a supplier regarding business classification information.

POQ_RESP_REPOS_INT.description: The POQ_RESP_REPOS_INT table contains question responses to be loaded into the POQ_RESPONSE_REPOSITORY table by the supplier qualification response repository API.  These rows will be grouped by BATCH_ID.

POQ_RESP_REPOS_VALUE_INT.description: POQ_RESP_REPOS_VALUE_INT stores response values for its parent row in POQ_RESP_REPOS_INT table.  For a POQ_RESP_REPOS_INT row which is an input text question, there will always be one child row in this table.  For a POQ_RESP_REPOS_INT row that is a single-select multiple-choice question, there will either 0 or 1 child row in this table.  For a POQ_RESP_REPOS_INT row for a multiple-select multiple-choice question, there will be 0 or more rows in this table.  Note that for multiple-choice questions with a null value, there will be no child value row in this table.

POQ_RULES.description: POQ_RULES stores the conditions that should be met in order to include a qualification area to be part of the questionnaire that would be generated using the rule set. It stores the type of condition, operators required to specify a condition if it depends on the value of a supplier attribute and the sequence in which any  qualification area appears in the questionnaire.

POQ_RULE_AREA_QUESTIONS.description: POQ_RULE_AREA_QUESTIONS contains the original qualification area id s that are to be shown in the questionnaire when a rule condition is met. The latest revision -at the time of creation of questionnaire -of the qualification area are to be used.

POQ_RULE_SETS_B.description: POQ_RULE_SETS_B stores the information of all rule sets maintained in the system. It stores the name of the rule set, description, instructions and a flag to indicate if question branching is to be used when generating a questionnaire using this rule set.

POQ_RULE_SETS_TL.description: poq_rule_sets_tl contains the translatable Registration introduction, Supplier introduction and Internal introduction text which can be provided to users for generated questionnaire.

POQ_RULE_SET_BU_ASSIGNMENTS.description: POQ_RULE_SET_BU_ASSIGNMENTS stores the BU s that are assigned to a given rule set.

POQ_RULE_SET_BU_EVENT_RULES.description: POQ_RULE_SET_BU_EVENT_RULES stores the information about the owner and internal responder of a business unit corresponding to an event.

POQ_SUPPLIER_ATTRIBUTES_B.description: POQ_SUPPLIER_ATTRIBUTES_B contains information about attributes mapped to the supplier profile. The table stores details such as question type, responder type, and response type for each of the mapped attributes.

POQ_SUPPLIER_ATTRIBUTES_TL.description: POQ_SUPPLIER_ATTRIBUTES_TL contains the translatable supplier attribute name for each supplier attribute code value.

POQ_SUPPLIER_ELIGIBILITY.description: POQ_SUPPLIER_ELIGIBILITY contains the records for suppliers and business units combination. Each record indicates the eligibility of a supplier to take part in events like Sourcing negotation, for a specific business unit.

POQ_SUPPLIER_ELIG_HISTORY.description: POQ_SUPPLIER_ELIG_HISTORY contains the history for records of table POQ_SUPPLIER_ELIGIBILITY. Each record indicates the change in the eligibility of a supplier to take part in events like Sourcing negotation, for a specific business unit.

PO_AI_HEADER_RECOMMENDATIONS.description: AI based Recommendations are stored in this table at Purchasing Document Header level.

PO_AI_LINE_RECOMMENDATIONS.description: AI based Recommendations are stored in this table at Purchasing Document Line level.

PO_AI_SCORING_REQ_TRAIL.description: PO_AI_SCORING_REQ_TRAIL records each call to IOT Scoring API to fetch recommendations. Stores REQUEST PAYLOAD sent to the API and RESPONSE PAYLOAD received from the API.

PO_INTAKE_REQUEST_ATTR_CFG.description: Stores attribute configuration for intake requests at header or line level.

PO_INTAKE_REQUEST_HEADERS.description: Stores intake request header information, status, workflow and outcome links.

PO_INTAKE_REQUEST_LINES.description: Stores individual intake request line details, amounts, items, and fulfillment attributes.

PO_INTAKE_REQUEST_TEMPLATES.description: Stores definitions and defaults used to create intake requests, including workflow and outcome settings.

PO_INTAKE_TEMPLATE_ASSIGNMENTS.description: Stores requisition BUID corresponding to intake request templates which are used to create intake requests

PO_MS_TEAMS_OBJ_MAP.description: PO_MS_TEAMS_OBJ_MAP stores current mappings from an application object (e.g., a 'PO' or 'REQ') to a Microsoft Teams chat or channel.

POI_PNS_CATEGORIES.description: This table stores information about the product and services categories details.

POI_PNS_VENDOR_CATEGORIES.description: This table stores information about the supplier product and services categories details.

POZ_PROCESSING_ERRORS.description: Stores error details encountered during the processing of registration or change requests or spend auth requests etc.

POZ_VALIDATION_RESPONSE.description: This Table stores the values received from validation rest responses.
